text: Science has a clearer story about deliberate practice than social media does. Deliberate practice isn't just about repetition. It's a focused way to improve. Think of it as setting specific goals and receiving feedback. That's the key! Research shows that just practicing isn’t enough. It's the quality of practice that matters. So, next time you pick up a skill, remember: deliberate practice can transform your abilities. Want to dive deeper into the science of learning? Follow for more insights!
